mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_ai_result (comment_id, task_type, status, attempt_count) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{taskType}, 'PENDING', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'PENDING', result_json = NULL, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NULL, created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE comment_ai_result SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_json = #{resultJson}, model = #{model}, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND task_type = #{taskType}
mapper.select: SELECT id, comment_id, task_type, status, result_json, model, error_message, attempt_count, created_at, completed_at FROM comment_ai_result WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND task_type = #{taskType}

SELECT cc.id FROM community_comment cc WHERE cc.status = 'PUBLISHED'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM comment_ai_result ar WHERE ar.comment_id = cc.id AND ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' )
ORDER BY cc.id
